svg:
<title id="title>Analytics Service Failure Modes <desc" id="desc">Analytics failure modes: duplicate events, data loss, schema drift, and identity resolution issues
<rect width="900" height="600" fill="var(--bg-panel, #f8fafc)/>
Analytics Service Failure Modes <text" x="450" y="58 text-anchor="middle" font-size="13 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)">Duplicate events, data loss, schema drift, and identity issues
<text x="235 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">1. Duplicate Events
<text x="120 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Original Event <text" x="120" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">id: abc123
<line x1="185 y1="178" x2="215 y2="178" stroke="var(--text-theme, #64748b)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)/> Retry
<text x="285 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Duplicate 1 <text" x="285" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fcd34d">id: abc123
<line x1="350 y1="178" x2="380 y2="178" stroke="var(--text-theme, #64748b)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)/> Retry
<text x="400 y="180" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="white>...
<text" x="235" y="290 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Metrics inflated 2-3x! <text x="235 y="310" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Network retries, no idempotency <text" x="235" y="330 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Idempotency keys, dedup window
<text x="665 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #b45309">2. Data Loss
<text x="540 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>1000 Events <text" x="540" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#bfdbfe">Sent
<line x1="595 y1="178" x2="625 y2="178" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Queue full
<text x="685 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>700 Events <text" x="685" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fcd34d">Received
<line x1="740 y1="178" x2="770 y2="178" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> 300 lost
<text x="810 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>300 <text" x="810" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">DROPPED
<text x="665 y="290" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Silent data loss corrupts decisions! <text" x="665" y="310 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: No backpressure, dropped events <text x="665 y="330" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Acknowledgments, retry queues, monitoring
<rect" x="30" y="340 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #8b5cf6)" stroke-width="2/> 3. Schema Drift
<rect" x="50" y="380 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #f5f3ff)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #c4b5fd)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="60" y="395 width="140" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #8b5cf6)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #6d28d9)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="130" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Old Schema v1 <text x="130 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#c4b5fd>user_id: string <text" x="130" y="448 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#c4b5fd">amount: number
<line x1="205 y1="425" x2="235 y2="425" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Breaking change
<text x="315 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>New Schema v2 <text" x="315" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">user_id: int <text x="315 y="448" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fca5a5>currency: added
<text" x="235" y="495 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Downstream queries break! <text x="235 y="515" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Uncoordinated schema changes <text" x="235" y="535 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Schema registry, versioning, migration
<text x="665 y="365" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">4. Identity Resolution Issues
<text x="560 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Anonymous <text" x="560" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">device_id: abc <text x="560 y="448" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#6ee7b7>10 events
<text x="650 y="415" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Login
<rect" x="675" y="395 width="140" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #3b82f6)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #1e40af)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="745" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Logged In <text x="745 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#bfdbfe>user_id: 12345 <text" x="745" y="448 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#bfdbfe">5 events
<text x="665 y="495" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Which identity is authoritative? <text" x="665" y="515 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: Multiple identity types, no merge logic <text x="665 y="535" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Identity graph, merge rules, attribution
<marker" id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9 refY="3.5" orient="auto> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)/>
<marker" id="arrow-red" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9 refY="3.5" orient="auto>
